jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Lupin - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
